---
title: "CS702 Computational Interaction"
subtitle: "Lab Assignments"
---

## About

Lab assignments for CS702 Computational Interaction, MSc Computing at Singapore Management University.

## Labs

- [Week 2: Decision Theory](labs/week-02.qmd)
- [Week 3: Bayesian Inference](labs/week-03.qmd)
- [Week 4: Multi-Armed Bandits](labs/week-04.qmd)
- [Week 5: Markov Decision Problems](labs/week-05.qmd)
- [Week 6: Descrete Optimisations](labs/week-06.qmd)
- [Week 7: PCTL](labs/week-07.qmd)
- [Week 8: Dynamical Systems](labs/week-08.qmd)
- [Week 10: State Space Model](labs/week-10.qmd)
- [Week 11: Optimization-Based Control](labs/week-11.qmd)
- [Week 12: TBA](labs/week-12.qmd)
